name: Constructor
description: AI-native search and recommendations API for e-commerce, with personalization, merchandising, and behavioral ranking built in.

seo.title: Constructor — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Constructor.io is an AI-native search and recommendations API for e-commerce, optimizing for revenue with personalization and merchandising.

when_to_use: AI-native product search for e-commerce catalog
Personalized search results ranked by shopper behavior
Recommendations API for cross-sell and upsell modules
Merchandising rules layered on top of ML search

pros: AI-first product discovery tuned for e-commerce KPIs
Optimizes for revenue and conversion, not just relevance
Handles search, browse, recs, and collections in one platform
Strong case studies with mid-to-large retailers
cons: Enterprise pricing with long sales cycles
Heavy lift to migrate from existing search stack
Less transparent ranking than open-source alternatives
Overkill for catalogs under a few thousand SKUs
review.verdict: Conversion-focused search for serious retailers willing to commit to an enterprise contract and migration effort.
review.best_for: Mid-to-large e-commerce teams optimizing search for measurable revenue lift.
review.not_for: Small catalogs, content sites, or teams wanting self-serve pricing.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
